name: @nyx/napi
description: npm wrapper around the nyx-napi Rust crate: builds the native .node addon + TypeScript declarations that the Electron core-host loads.

scripts.//abi: Build the .node against ELECTRON's embedded Node ABI, then verify it loads via the Electron binary in ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=1 (see scripts/verify-abi.cjs).
scripts.//core: Smoke the NyxCore surface (r2d2 pool + non-blocking AsyncTask DB + MCP-shares-pool) under Electron-as-Node (see scripts/verify-core.cjs).
scripts.//exec-state: Smoke exec-state DB persistence + boot normalization (PRD-5 #1) under Electron-as-Node (see scripts/verify-exec-state.cjs).
scripts.//command-runtime: Smoke the managed-command runtime (createCommandRunner + MCP runtime tools at parity + restore/snapshot) under Electron-as-Node (see scripts/verify-command-runtime.cjs).
